BREAKING: Marko Grujić will leave Liverpool on loan in January, his agent Zoran Stojadinovic has confirmed.

According to @MiloseMarkovicu, Grujic's agent is pushing for the player to remain in England and not make the same mistake Lazar Markovic made.

🗣 Stojadinovic (Agent): "Grujic must go on loan to a team where he will play. This has to be an English club, not to make a mistake as Lazar Markovic did. If Lazar was my client I would never have advised him to leave England."

Liverpool's Sadio Mane has opened up over his on-the-pitch exchange of words with manager Jurgen Klopp after Saturday's 1-1 draw with Chelsea and insists there was no row between the pair.

The Reds boss took to the field following the full-time whistle and appeared to be having a frank discussion with the Senegal international.


However, Mane has played down any suggestions of a feud between them.

He told Sky Sports News: “He [Klopp] asked me to play on the right side and one time I tried to ask for the ball in the number nine position.

“Mo [Salah] was on my side and the coach was shouting 'Sadio come onto the right side'.

“After the game I told the coach it was easier if you told Mo to come in because he was close to you.

“But it was friendly, it was not because I was unhappy or something else. There was no problem, I was just communicating and explaining that to him after the game.”
